macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Major US Indices Plunge into Correction on March 27
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed at 6,368.85, down 1.67%; Dow at 45,166.64, down 1.73%; Nasdaq at 20,948.36, down 2.15%. Dow and Nasdaq entered correction territory amid escalating Middle East tensions.

items.title: Trump Extends Iran Deadline by 10 Days, Stocks Flat in Pre-Market
items.summary: President Trump extended his 10-day pause on Iran Strait of Hormuz threats, leading to flat stock futures. Oil prices climbed amid ongoing conflict concerns, with Asian and European markets closing lower.

items.title: ECB's Lagarde Warns Markets Too Optimistic on Iran War
items.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde stated equity markets are overly optimistic amid the 'real shock' of the Iran conflict. Markets in Europe declined, with DAX down 1.38%, FTSE 100 down 0.05%, CAC 40 down 0.87%.

items.title: Recession Risk Heightens After 4 Weeks of Iran War
items.summary: Four weeks into the US-Israel war on Iran, major indices are sharply down, energy stocks up 25%, mortgage rates at 6.5%, and Fed rate cuts unlikely. Experts call recession a 'real risk' with rising inflation and interest rates.

items.title: European Markets Close Lower Amid Middle East Escalation
items.summary: DAX closed at 22,300.75, down 1.38%; FTSE 100 at 9,967.35, down 0.05%; CAC 40 at 7,701.95, down 0.87%. Asian markets had no trading on Saturday.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops to $66,144 Amid Extreme Fear as Market Cap Falls 3.1%
items.summary: Bitcoin traded at $66,144, down 3.64%, with the Fear & Greed Index at 13 indicating extreme fear; Ethereum fell to $1,986, losing 7.5% weekly, while 78 of top 100 coins declined.[4][5]
items.source: YouTube Crypto Daily Report & MEXC News

items.title: White House AI and Crypto Adviser David Sacks Steps Down After 130 Days
items.summary: David Sacks concluded his temporary role as White House adviser on AI and crypto, having advocated for key legislative priorities and a strategic Bitcoin reserve.[6]

items.title: Franklin Templeton Partners with Ondo Finance for On-Chain ETFs
items.summary: Franklin Templeton teamed up with Ondo Finance to offer ETFs directly via crypto wallets, bypassing traditional brokers; NYSE also partnered with Securitize for blockchain-based stock settlements.[2]

items.title: Stablecoins Emerge as Key Infrastructure Amid Regulatory Focus
items.summary: Stablecoins are gaining prominence for cross-border transfers, DeFi, and liquidity, driving market attention to regulations on dollar-pegged tokens and bank integrations.[1]

items.title: LegacyCoin CTO Launches for Digital Asset Inheritance and Continuity
items.summary: LegacyCoin CTO introduced a self-custody solution with on-chain conditions for asset transfers upon predefined events, addressing long-term digital asset management challenges.[3]

items.title: Litecoin Gains Regulatory Clarity with LitVM Layer 2 Testnet Launch
items.summary: SEC classified Litecoin as a digital commodity; LitVM Layer 2 testnet launched in March 2026, enabling EVM-compatible smart contracts for DeFi on Litecoin.[2]

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Epoch AI Reports GPT5.4 Pro Solves FrontierMath Problem
items.summary: Epoch AI announced the first AI solution to one of FrontierMath's challenging problems by GPT5.4 Pro, marking a significant advancement in AI's formal reasoning capabilities.

items.title: University of Warwick AI Uncovers Over 100 New Planets
items.summary: Astronomers used a new AI tool on NASA data to discover more than 100 previously hidden exoplanets, demonstrating AI's power in astronomical analysis.

items.title: Colleges Adopt AI Faster Than Governance Structures
items.summary: Higher education institutions are rapidly integrating AI into admissions, curriculum, and operations, outpacing policy development and raising concerns about learning integrity and privacy.

items.title: US Marines Announce AI Forum and Hackathon for 2026
items.summary: The US Marine Corps issued a call for AI, machine learning, and data science experts to participate in the Modern Day Marine 2026 AI Forum Hackathon, focusing on predictive maintenance and autonomous systems.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Sony Raises PS5 Prices by £90 in UK and $100 in US
items.summary: Sony has increased PlayStation 5 prices significantly in major markets due to global pressures, sparking discussions on console market dynamics and potential PlayStation 6 launch in 2027.

items.title: Mega Cat Studios Releases New 'God of War' Video Game
items.summary: Indie developer Mega Cat Studios has launched a new 'God of War' title, marking a coming-of-age moment for the studio as reported on March 28.

items.title: John and Brenda Romero: Game Industry in 'Really Horrible Place'
items.summary: Industry veterans John and Brenda Romero describe the current gaming sector as worse than the 1983 crash, citing massive cancellations, layoffs, high budgets, and AI pushback.

items.title: Crimson Desert Sells 2M Copies Amid Controversy and Mixed Reviews
items.summary: Crimson Desert achieves 2 million sales but faces immediate backlash with mixed reviews following its release.

items.title: CookieRun: NewWorld Announced for 2029 Release
items.summary: Devsisters unveils CookieRun: NewWorld, a 3D open-world RPG for the franchise's 20th anniversary, during DevNow 2026 Showcase.

items.title: GTA 6 Early Access Rumors from Rockstar Job Posting
items.summary: Speculation rises that GTA 6 fans could play early, fueled by a Rockstar job listing amid ongoing hype for the massive project.

items.title: Xbox Partner Preview Reveals STALKER 2 Expansion and More
items.summary: Xbox Partner Preview March 2026 announces STALKER 2: Cost of Hope expansion, alongside other titles like Payday: Aces High VR.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
